summary: Context-Aware Chart Levels (HUD) feature fully tested. All 11 backend tests passed. Frontend Playwright tests verified HUD badges, level family buttons, and manual override functionality. Backend N3 overnight fix verified: CAPITULACAO removed from overnight fading block.
passed_tests: ✅ N3 Overnight Fix: Line 3996 is 'if regime == TRANSICAO:' (CAPITULACAO removed)
✅ N3 Overnight Fix: Line 3997 confirms Fading comment
✅ Removed Features: VP Multi-day not in DataBentoChart.jsx
✅ Removed Features: VWAP Multi-day not in DataBentoChart.jsx
✅ Frontend: HUD Regime Badge shows 'BULL' correctly
✅ Frontend: HUD Phase Badge shows 'RECON' correctly
✅ Frontend: Level family buttons visible for BULL: vp_session, vp_d1, vwap_session, vwap_trend, gamma, overnight
✅ Frontend: vwap_shock (Bands ±3σ) correctly HIDDEN for BULL regime
✅ Frontend: VP Multi-day toggle does NOT exist (correctly removed)
✅ Frontend: VWAP Multi-day toggle does NOT exist (correctly removed)
✅ Frontend: Manual override toggle works (click shows override state)
critical_code_review_comments: REGIME_MATRIX in DataBentoChart.jsx correctly defines level visibility per regime
detectPhase() correctly returns RECON/TARGET_LOCK/IN_TRADE based on v3Signal and activePosition
getLineConfig() correctly applies phase-aware styling (opacity, lineWidth, lineStyle)
applyOpacity() correctly converts hex color + opacity to RGBA
N3 overnight fading fix at line 3996: 'if regime == TRANSICAO:' (CAPITULACAO removed)
VP Multi-day and VWAP Multi-day correctly removed from LEVEL_FAMILIES array
Manual override state correctly managed with manualOverrides useState
Regime change correctly resets overrides via useEffect

test_credentials.note: Used for API and Playwright tests

context_for_next_testing_agent: Context-Aware Chart Levels (HUD) feature fully tested. Key components: (1) REGIME_MATRIX defines level visibility per regime (core/ref/null). (2) detectPhase() returns RECON/TARGET_LOCK/IN_TRADE. (3) getLineConfig() applies phase-aware styling. (4) N3 overnight fix: CAPITULACAO removed from overnight fading block (line 3996). (5) VP Multi-day and VWAP Multi-day removed. Test file: /app/backend/tests/test_context_aware_chart_levels.py. Current regime: BULL. Phase: RECON.

feature_verification.HUD Regime Badge: Working - shows current regime from v3Signal.nivel_1.regime
feature_verification.HUD Phase Badge: Working - shows RECON/TARGET/IN TRADE based on detectPhase()

feature_verification.Manual Override: Working - clicking button toggles override state with visual feedback
feature_verification.N3 Overnight Fix: Working - CAPITULACAO not in overnight fading block (line 3996)
feature_verification.Chart Price Lines: Working - POC, VAH, VAL, VWAP, bands visible per regime
